posts.text:
🗣️ 🎙️ @anitakopacz will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting her paperback release of  ’The Wind On Her Tongue’ 📕! Listen live on The Breakfast Club and Set your alarms ⏰ ➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🗣️🎙️ @MikeWiLLMadeIt will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting his upcoming album ‘The Rest’ out on 3/20! Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

Ma$e & Shyne sit down and get real in a recent interview, reflecting on dating the same woman (Brandy 👀), opening up about the Diddy accusations, and calling out the lack of accountability from those around him that led to his ultimate demise.🤔
 Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa!

Video

Ma$e & Shyne sit down and get real in a recent interview, reflecting on dating the same woman (Brandy 👀), opening up about the Diddy accusations, and calling out the lack of accountability from those around him that led to his ultimate demise.
🤔 Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa!

Video

Another Florida man is in the news and gets Donkey of the Day for firing off his hammer over a non-working karaoke machine… Seriously, what’s in y’all’s water? 🥲 Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

🚨 @robinthicke  opens up on how there were certain moments of grief and loss in his life that called him to have gratitude and the inspiration that can grow out of pain. ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam  on @netflix

Video

🚨 @ripmicheals came through to promote his upcoming comedy show, 'April Fools Comedy Jam,' going down April 4th, but how is his health, considering his heart is functioning at 18%?

Video

🚨 @robinthicke  & @DiRealShaggy  came through to promote their new song “Looking Lovely,” and Robin breaks down trying to make “Black music” and how he and @direalshaggy managed to blend cultures on their new track!

Video

After Teyana Taylor had to defend herself against an overly aggressive security guard, the Oscars have since spoken out, sharing their support and apologizing for what occurred and hopefully this keeps Teyana in high spirits during her amazing season! Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa 🏆

Video
Good morning USAAAAAAA! Peace to the planet it’s Tuesday & @robinthicke and @DiRealShaggy is pulling up today! So tap live breakfastclubonline.com/list…

🗣️🎙️ @ripmicheals will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting his upcoming comedy show 'April Fools Comedy Jam' going down April 4th at the Barclays Center in Brooklyn!  

Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🗣️🎙️ @robinthicke and @DiRealShaggy will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting their new song 'Looking Lovely' out now!

Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🫏 Donkey of the Day goes to Rebel Wilson’s PR team for leaked audio allegedly plotting to create an online smear campaign targeting *The Deb* producer Amanda Ghost. 🤔 Do we realize how frequently this is occurring??? Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

🚨 Thanks to @queenafua for gifting us our own 21-day detox fast! Who else wants to try to detox their lives 👀. To learn more check out the full conversation on @netflix !

Video

🚨 Last night, the 2026 Oscar Awards went down, and The Breakfast Club weighs in on last night’s wins and losses. We took to the phone lines to check the temperature in the room .🏆
Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix!

Video

🚨 @queenafua  came through to promote her 21-day detox, but what are some ways  can you maintain the benefits of your detox? “Words are medicine.” ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🏆 Last night were the 2026 Oscar Awards, and there were a lot of big wins! Ryan Coogler and Michael B. Jordan took home their first Oscars, and Teyana Taylor celebrated everyone who won, even after losing the Best Supporting Actress category. Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa.

Video

🚨Jordan’s book “Choreplay: The Marriage-Saving Magic of Getting Your Head Out of Your Ass” touches on the idea that some men truly only like the pum pum but not the woman herself enough to help. Before you decide that relationships aren’t for you, have you tried flipping the dynamics in your household to help save your relationship?  ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix

Video

🚨 Uber is catching heat for discrimination after introducing a gender-based “women-only” ride feature for drivers and riders. Is it discrimination or discernment? Check out the full @breakfastclubam conversation on @netflix.

Video

🚨 @jordancarlos  came through to promote his new book 📕 “Choreplay: The Marriage-Saving Magic of Getting Your Head Out of Your Ass”! Jordan breaks down how 'Choreplay' saved his marriage! ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.
